event_name: Ashes of the Empire Planetary Qualifier
event_description: Play - Planetary Qualifier | Discount registration of of $35 is available through Sunday, September 13. Registrations after that point will be full price. Players must register and pay here: https://www.atomicempire.com/Store/Event/11176 to be able to participate. Once registered and paid with the store, players will be added into the Melee event by the organizer, manually, on a weekly basis. Full event details, like the schedule and prizing, are also available at the registration link.
